core_objective.text: BUILD AN ADVANCED NEURAL-NETWORK EQUITY RESEARCH PIPELINE: ingest vault_equity OHLCV (FMP/PostgreSQL/CSV fallback), engineer lagged sequence features with strict anti-leakage (shift, walk-forward only), train a small PyTorch MLP or 1-layer LSTM for next-bar direction with expanding-window OOS folds, add calibration and dropout, backtest OOS-only with transaction-cost assumptions, and emit verified PNL JSON+MD plus model card. Research only — no live trading.

master_plan.title: Vault-equity data + sequence dataset builder
master_plan.intent: Create data_loader.py and dataset.py: load_bars from vault_equity contract; build_sequences(df, lookback=60) -> X,y with labels shifted so features never include future bars. CSV fallback to sample_data/aapl_5min_sample.csv.

master_plan.title: Leakage guards + walk-forward split utilities
master_plan.intent: Create splits.py: expanding-window walk-forward indices (min_train=800, test=100, step=100), assert_no_leakage(X,y,ts) rejecting perfect future correlation, and normalize fit on train only per fold.

master_plan.title: PyTorch MLP/LSTM model + train_walk_forward
master_plan.intent: Create nn_model.py: small MLP (64-32) OR LSTM(32) predicting next-bar return sign; train_walk_forward uses splits.py OOS folds only; save fold checkpoints under models/fold_*.pt; CPU-friendly; seed for reproducibility.

master_plan.title: OOS backtest with costs + calibration report
master_plan.intent: Create backtest_nn.py: run ONLY OOS predictions; apply 1bp slippage; compute PNL, max DD, hit rate, Sharpe; write reports/pnl_report.json and reports/model_card.md documenting architecture, leakage controls, and fold metrics.

master_plan.title: pytest verification suite
master_plan.intent: Add tests/test_nn_pipeline.py: pytest asserting finite OOS metrics, non-empty trade log, leakage assert passes on sample data, and nn_model trains at least one fold without CUDA.
